caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved top featuring a decorative floral embroidered neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, a circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing as she expresses herself. She uses her hands to gesture, moving them from a neutral position near her waist upward and outward as she speaks. Her facial expression remains engaged and professional as she delivers her presentation. The background and her clothing remain constant, while her head movements and hand gestures evolve slightly across the timeline.
